2026-04-24T22:38:43.2864187Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2864732Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2865148Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2865511Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2865825Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T22:38:43.2866064Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-24T22:38:43.2866420Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-24T22:38:43.2866825Z [36;1m{[0m
